title: crataegus altaica var. villosa
intro: Crataegus altaica var. villosa, also known as the Asian hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree species within the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The medicinal properties of Crataegus altaica var. villosa include its high content of bioflavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive function due to its ability to relax blood vessels and improve nutrient absorption. The herbal preparations of Crataegus altaica var. villosa include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or added to food products to harness its medicinal properties.
